compiled_state.title: .test-index: glob pattern entries non-functional with exact-match parser in test-gate
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: .test-index adds glob-pattern entries (plugins/dso/agents/*.md and plugins/dso/skills/**/*.md) that reference test-no-plugin-markdown-refs.sh. The parse_test_index function uses exact string matching — these glob entries never match individual file paths and create no test-gate coverage as intended.
File: .test-index
Category: maintainability

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC tier). Bug is in parse_test_index/read_test_index_for_source functions using exact string matching against glob patterns in .test-index entries. Investigation dispatching now.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Anti-pattern scan: found same exact-match pattern at record-test-status.sh:89 (read_test_index_for_source function). Applied same glob fix to that function in the same commit. Zero remaining occurrences outside these two files.
comments.author: Test
